# General Instructions
Always refer to the `architecture.md` file located in the root of this workspace for any technical context. 

## Strict Rules:
- Before generating any Mongoose schema, check the "Collections" section in `architecture.md`.
- Before generating any API routes, check the "API Endpoints" section in `architecture.md`.
- Ensure all generated code adheres to the React and Node.js folder structure defined in `architecture.md`.
- Do not add features or fields that are listed under the "What Was Cut" section.
